scripts.install:all: pnpm install && pnpm --prefix frontend install && pnpm --prefix backend install && pnpm --prefix mobile install && pnpm --prefix contracts/ethereum install
scripts.fe:eth:local: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "HH,ETH,VRF,BE,FE" "pnpm eth:node" "pnpm eth:deploy" "pnpm eth:vrf:watch" "pnpm dev:be" "pnpm dev:fe"
scripts.mobile:eth:local: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "HH,ETH,VRF,BE,MB" "pnpm eth:node" "pnpm eth:deploy" "pnpm eth:vrf:watch" "pnpm dev:be" "pnpm dev:mobile"
scripts.fe:sol:local: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "BE,FE,SOL" "pnpm dev:be" "pnpm dev:fe" "pnpm sol:docker && pnpm sol:inject-ngrok"
scripts.build: pnpm compile && pnpm --prefix backend build && pnpm --prefix frontend build
